name: GeometricPlane
summary: The GeometricPlane class represents a 3d geometric plane.

constructors.name: GeometricPlane
constructors.summary: Instantiates an XY-plane with the origin at (0,0,0).

constructors.name: GeometricPlane
constructors.summary: Instantiates a plane defined by the given coordinate system.

constructors.name: GeometricPlane
constructors.summary: Instantiates a plane defined by the given origin point and normal vector.

constructors.name: GeometricPlane
constructors.summary: Instantiates a plane defined by the given origin, X-axis vector and Y-axis vector.

methods.name: GetNormal
methods.summary: Returns a normalized normal vector of the plane.

properties.name: Normal
properties.summary: The normal vector of the plane.

properties.name: Origin
properties.summary: The origin point of the plane.
